title: oreoseris raphanifolia
intro: Oreoseris raphanifolia, also known as the wild radish or crested oreoseris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oreoseris raphanifolia include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and relieving digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
